ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., US, UK, IT, FR, EU) */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code for the region (e.g., US, UK, IT, FR, EU) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the size chart (e.g., US, UK, IT, FR, EU) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size chart */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the size chart belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_types" (
  "size_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size type */,
  "size_type_label" TEXT /* Label for the size type (e.g., INT, XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart the size belongs to */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size (e.g., INT, XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "size_value" INTEGER /* Value of the size (e.g., 2, 4, 6, 8, 10) */,
  "size_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size type the size belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_size_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_type_id") REFERENCES size_types ("size_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Code for the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., T-Shirt, Jeans, Dress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size assignment */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being assigned the size */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size being assigned to the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the assigned size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size assignment being tracked */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in the assigned size */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory level was last updated */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse where the inventory is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Manager, Employee) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "chart_id_from" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart being converted from */,
  "chart_id_to" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart being converted to */,
  "conversion_rule" TEXT /* Rule for converting between the two size charts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_chart_id_to FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id_to") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_chart_id_from FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id_from") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)
